SuperFAISS at tag v3.1.2 (documentation/version-header point over v3.1.1's library source, commit d62c162) — v3.0 channel-capable scratch banks + channel-scoped analytics + archive v3, v3.1 runtime-mutable channel vocabulary (Relabel), v3.1.1 AVX2 float32 dot/L2 sub-8 segment-remainder fix. v3.1.2 delta: stale channel-table contracts scrubbed in scratch.h/scratch.cpp/API.md/INTEGRATION.md, Relabel documented in API.md/INTEGRATION.md, version.h corrected to the released version (was 3.0.1). No kernel or behavior change since v3.1.1.
